title: LamQuant Lossless: A Real-Time, Bit-Exact, Wirelessly-Deployable EEG Compression Algorithm
description: Bit-exact lossless EEG compression codec. Integer-only Le Gall 5/3 lifting wavelet + LPC predictor (anytime adaptive, bias cancellation) + Golomb-Rice entropy coding, in a platform-independent wire format deployable on x86 / ARM / RISC-V without floating-point hardware. Achieves 2.287:1 on the full Temple University EEG Corpus (1.76 TB, 70,831 files) and 2.7229:1 on CHB-MIT. RP2350 Hazard3 RISC-V encode measured at 119x real-time via Verilator RTL simulation. Reproducibility package for the IEEE Transactions on Biomedical Circuits and Systems submission (2026).
